untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (identifying two distinct bottoms at same price level separated by 2-6 weeks) requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not available in single-bar indicator set. Confirmation point (highest high between two bottoms) requires historical pattern state tracking. Volume comparison between left and right sides requires pattern-aware volume analysis.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used close crosses_above r1 (pivot resistance) as approximate confirmation breakout, and hvol_20 comparison as volume strength check. However, this does not capture the core double-bottom geometry. A proper implementation would require a dedicated pattern scanner or multi-bar state machine to identify the two bottoms, measure separation distance, detect the intervening high, and confirm breakout. The 40% average rise and 78% success rate from parameters are backtesting outputs, not entry conditions.
